Lyrics.text:
1. Jeso Tompo manan-kery,
Miarova anay!
Ry Mpitady ondry very,
Mamonje anay !
2. Jeso Tompo be fitia,
Mitsinjova anay !
Ny fanahinay mania,
Miantrà anay!
3. Jeso Tompo be fiantra,
Mijere anay !
Ny fanahinay mahantra,
Mitahia anay.
4. Jeso Tompo mahalala.
Mananara anay !
Ny fanahinay adala,
Mitariha anay.
